# Consolidation Standards (Chat → RN/RD → Master Log)

## Goal
Turn long chats and scattered notes into canonical research artifacts without losing detail or inventing facts.

## Required structure for a consolidation note (RN/RD)
1) Header (title, date range, run IDs covered)
2) Executive Summary (facts only)
3) Chronology (run-by-run; include [UNKNOWN] explicitly)
4) Engineering deltas (file changes, instrumentation changes)
5) Findings:
   - [EVIDENCE] blocks
   - [INTERPRETATION] blocks
   - [HYPOTHESIS] blocks
6) Proof packets (only supported claims)
7) Artifact inventory (local vs external)
8) Promotion checklist (what is robust vs provisional; what needs re-run)

## Non-negotiables
- Never merge runs without explicit run IDs
- Never promote claims without proof packets
- Any missing values are [UNKNOWN]
